title: SAFARI-IGHJ: SAFARI-Score ML Classifier and Validation Framework — Code and Data
description: SAFARI-Score sklearn ML classifier for IGHJ gene classification, training data (147 candidates, 21 species), gold standard labels (8 species from IMGT), LOOCV results, and Bos taurus positive control script. Associated with the manuscript 'From Computational Prediction to Transcriptomic and Genomic Evidence: Large-Scale Validation of SAFARI-IGHJ Across 11.4 Million Reads Confirms Immunoglobulin J Gene Functionality in Wild Ruminants'.

creators.name: Correia, Jean Pierre
creators.affiliation: Digital Balance AI -- Digital Labs Independent Research Group

notes: This release accompanies the manuscript submitted to BMC Genomics. Validation BAM files (>2 GB total) are available as separate Zenodo uploads due to size constraints.
